channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ive tried plenty of TikTok-famous K-beauty products: Here are my favorites on sale during Prime Day
item.description: Our Mashable shopping reporter (and K-beauty fan) rounded up the best viral K-beauty products on sale during Amazon Prime Day.

item.title: Mashable Choice Award-winning Soundcore Sleep A30 Special earbuds are $70 off this Prime Day
item.description: There are many different kinds of earbuds, including ones designed for sleeping. Save 30% on the Soundcore Sleep A30 earbuds, a Mashable Choice Award winner.

item.title: I review video games for a living, and these are the best PS5 games of 2026 so far to buy
item.description: Looking to pick up a game or two this month? These are the best PS5 games of the year so far that are worth your money.

item.title: NYT Pips hints, answers for June 24, 2026
item.description: The New York Times' latest game, Pips, brings domino fun to your desktop. How to play Pips as well as hints in case you get stuck.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for June 24, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for June 24, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for June 24, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1831 on June 24 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
